{"success":true,"response":"The process `J09C` has been executed end-to-end according to the stored rule:

- Temporary working tables were created from `decision_table` for tours starting with `J09C` and classified into `ENTSCHEIDUNG` values (`KSA`, `EVU`, and `MANDATORY_READING`) using the specified house, address, and EABL rules (including the 2023/2024 “Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP” condition).
- Customer data was joined from `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`, with `SALES_MASTER` preferred where available and non-empty; otherwise `NET_MASTER` data was used.
- A CSV with all `MANDATORY_READING` rows was generated as `J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv` and (per the tool) stored under the session directory, then emailed to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
- A CSV with all remaining rows (`ENTSCHEIDUNG` not equal to `MANDATORY_READING`) was generated as `J09C.csv` and emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- All temporary tables (`J09C_temp`, `J09C_step4`, `J09C_with_masters`, `J09C_final`) have been deleted.

If you’d like, I can list or describe the columns/filters used for either CSV in more detail.","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
The process `J09C` has been executed end-to-end according to the stored rule:

- Temporary working tables were created from `decision_table` for tours starting with `J09C` and classified into `ENTSCHEIDUNG` values (`KSA`, `EVU`, and `MANDATORY_READING`) using the specified house, address, and EABL rules (including the 2023/2024 “Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP” condition).
- Customer data was joined from `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`, with `SALES_MASTER` preferred where available and non-empty; otherwise `NET_MASTER` data was used.
- A CSV with all `MANDATORY_READING` rows was generated as `J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv` and (per the tool) stored under the session directory, then emailed to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
- A CSV with all remaining rows (`ENTSCHEIDUNG` not equal to `MANDATORY_READING`) was generated as `J09C.csv` and emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- All temporary tables (`J09C_temp`, `J09C_step4`, `J09C_with_masters`, `J09C_final`) have been deleted.

If you’d like, I can list or describe the columns/filters used for either CSV in more detail.

kwargs.content:
The process with `process_rule_id = 'J09C'` has been executed end-to-end according to its stored rule. Summary of what was done:

- Built temporary working tables from `decision_table` for all tours starting with `J09C`, classifying rows by `ENTSCHEIDUNG` (`KSA`, `EVU`, `MANDATORY_READING`) using the configured house/address/EABL rules (including the 2023/2024 “Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP” condition).
- Joined customer/master data from `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER` (preferring `SALES_MASTER` where present and non-empty, otherwise falling back to `NET_MASTER`).
- Generated:
  - `J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv` for all `MANDATORY_READING` rows, stored in the session directory and emailed to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
  - `J09C.csv` for all other rows (`ENTSCHEIDUNG` ≠ `MANDATORY_READING`), emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Dropped all intermediate temporary tables (`J09C_temp`, `J09C_step4`, `J09C_with_masters`, `J09C_final`).

If you tell me which output you’re interested in (e.g., `J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv` vs `J09C.csv`), I can detail the exact columns and filters used.
